name: Savage Palm
bio:
Orc Breaker, the Power of the Wilderness. A guardian of mountains and forests who joined the Net of Secrets to protect interests with wild fists.

Role: Physical Single Target
Intro: A Physical Damage Dealer hero that deals Physical Damage to a single enemy and increases its own Physical Damage.

skillSlots.name: Frenzied Blastfist
skillSlots.description: Deals 190% P.DMG to single enemy target and increases own P.DMG Boost by 10% for 2 turns.

skillSlots.name: Robust Body
skillSlots.description: Increases ATK by 10% and HP by 5%.
